common.tapSetHome: Tap to set your home location

auth.trustedSubtitle: Trusted baby care for your little one
auth.trustLine: Verified baby nannies · Infant CPR · Support in English & Hindi
auth.safeData: Your home details stay private and encrypted.
auth.wrongRole: This account is not a parent. Use the Caregiver or Coordinator app.
auth.wrongRoleServant: This account is not a caregiver. Use the Parent or Coordinator app.
auth.joinSubtitle: Find trusted nannies for your baby
auth.searchPlaceholder: Search your society, street, or area
auth.servantSubtitle: Sign in with the email your coordinator registered. Earn with dignity — on your schedule.
auth.noSelfSignup: No self-signup. Your coordinator creates your account and verifies your ID.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Use the email and password your coordinator set when onboarding you.
auth.networkLocalhost: Cannot reach the server. On a real phone, set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL in .env to your PC IP (run ipconfig), then restart: npx expo start -c
auth.networkGeneric:
Cannot reach {{base}}

• Backend running? (npm start in Backend)
• Phone on same Wi‑Fi as PC (not mobile data)
• Windows Firewall: allow Node/port 5000
• Restart app after .env change: npx expo start -c

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

home.searchPlaceholder: Find trusted baby nannies near you
home.requestInArea: Request a nanny in your area
home.helpersNearby_one: {{count}} verified helper nearby — first to accept gets your job
home.helpersNearby_other: {{count}} verified helpers nearby — first to accept gets your job
home.noHelpersNearby: No helpers nearby right now — your request stays open until one is available
home.enableLocation: Enable location or set your home address to send a request
home.privacyHint: Helper names are private — send a request and the first available helper in your area will accept.
home.noBookingsYet: No bookings yet — tap Send request now above

browse.noSkillNearby: No {{skill}} helpers nearby yet — try a request
browse.enableLocationBroadcast: Enable location or set your home address to broadcast a request
browse.broadcastToArea_one: Send to {{count}} verified helper in your area — only they will see this on their dashboard. First to accept gets the job.
browse.broadcastToArea_other: Send to {{count}} verified helpers in your area — only they will see this on their dashboard. First to accept gets the job.
browse.noSkillInArea: No {{skill}} helpers nearby yet — your request will wait until one is available in your area.
browse.noHelpersInArea: No verified helpers in your area yet — your request will wait until one is available nearby.
browse.tapSetHomeProfile: Tap to set your home location in Profile
browse.helperNotInArea: This helper is not available in your area
browse.countHintActive: Helper profiles are private. Send a request — only nearby helpers see it, and the first to accept is assigned to you.
browse.countHintNoSkill: No {{skill}} helpers in your area right now. You can still send a request — it will notify helpers when they come online.
browse.countHintNoHelpers: No verified helpers in your area right now. Send a request and it will stay open until one accepts.

bookings.noBookingsSub: Send a request from Home — nearby helpers will see it and the first to accept is assigned to you.
bookings.noActive: No active bookings — send a new request from Home
bookings.noRecent: No past bookings yet — completed visits appear here
bookings.tapTrack: Tap to open live map when helper is on the way
bookings.selectHelperFirst: Select a helper from Browse first
bookings.visitLocationRequired: Please set the visit location on the map.
bookings.categoryRequired: Select what type of help you need.
bookings.timeSlotRequired: Select at least one time slot.
bookings.locationRequiredShort: Allow live location or pick your address on the map.
bookings.whatHelpNeed: What type of help do you need?
bookings.helperOnWaySub: Live GPS — purple pin is helper, blue pin is your home
bookings.requestHelpSub: Only verified helpers who serve your location will see this request on their dashboard. Whoever accepts first is assigned to you.
bookings.nearbyHelpersNotify: {{count}} {{skill}} helper(s) in your area will be notified
bookings.noHelpersInAreaNow: No {{skill}} helpers in your area right now
bookings.requestStaysOpen: Your {{skill}} request stays open until a verified helper in this area comes online.
bookings.notifiedHelpers: {{count}} verified helper(s) in your area will see this on their dashboard. The first to accept gets your job.
bookings.requestSavedOffline: Your request is saved. Only helpers who serve your area will see it on their dashboard when they come online.
bookings.visitLocationPlaceholder: Search your home address or tap the map
bookings.requestSentSub: The helper will accept or decline. You will be notified.
bookings.helpersNotified: {{count}} verified helper(s) in your area will see this on their dashboard.
bookings.addAddressForMap: Add your visit address on this booking to see the live map when the helper shares location.
bookings.hintPendingBroadcast: Sent to {{count}} verified helper(s) in your area — only they can see this on their dashboard. First to accept gets the job.
bookings.hintPendingOpen: Waiting for a verified helper in your area — only nearby helpers will see this on their dashboard
bookings.hintConfirmedSharing: {{name}} is on the way — live map updates every few seconds below
bookings.hintConfirmedNoShare: Helper accepted — live map appears when they share location in their app
bookings.hintActiveSharing: Work in progress — helper location updates on the map below
bookings.hintActiveNoShare: Work in progress — waiting for helper to share location
bookings.hintExpired: Visit time passed — no helper accepted or work was not completed
bookings.trackingCaption: Helper is on the way · updated {{time}}

location.label: Location

location.webGpsHint: Search for a place or use GPS to set location.

timeSlots.hint: Tap to select multiple slots (1 hour each)

timeSlots.noneLeftToday: No time slots left for today. Pick a later date.

workOtp.homeTitle: Share this OTP with your caregiver
workOtp.homeHint: Tell them this 4-digit code so they can begin work. Expires in 5 minutes.

BOOKING_CREATED.title: New booking request
BOOKING_CREATED.body: You have a new booking request

BOOKING_OPEN.title: Job request in your area
BOOKING_OPEN.body: A customer nearby needs help — accept first to get the job

BOOKING_COMPLETED.title: Booking completed
BOOKING_COMPLETED.body: Your booking has been marked completed

CLOCK_IN.title: Arrived at home
CLOCK_IN.body: Your caregiver arrived at your home

CAREGIVER_VERIFIED.title: You are verified
CAREGIVER_VERIFIED.body: Your profile is verified — you can accept jobs

WORK_START_OTP.title: Care-start OTP
WORK_START_OTP.body: Share this code with your helper
WORK_START_OTP.bodyWithOtp: OTP {{otp}} — share with {{name}} to start work

BOOKING_ACTIVE.title: Work started
BOOKING_ACTIVE.body: Your helper verified the OTP and started work

HELPER_ON_WAY.title: Helper is on the way
HELPER_ON_WAY.body: Your helper is sharing live location
